Class GeminiContentAdapter

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.gemini.adapter.GeminiContentAdapter
public class GeminiContentAdapter extends Object
An object-oriented adapter that converts a single Anahata AbstractMessage into one or more native Google GenAI Content objects, injecting in-band metadata headers for improved model self-awareness.

In the V2 simplified architecture, this adapter performs a 1-to-N mapping for ModelMessages: it synthesizes the required 'model' (calls) and 'tool' (responses) API messages from a single turn-holding ModelMessage.

Author:
anahata

    private final String

    The UUID of the provider for which the payload is being prepared.

  • Field Details

    • anahataMessage

      private final AbstractMessage anahataMessage
      The Anahata message instance to be converted.

    • includePruned

      private final boolean includePruned
      Whether to include parts marked as effectively pruned in the output payload.

    • targetProviderUuid

      private final String targetProviderUuid
      The UUID of the provider for which the payload is being prepared. Used to ensure thought signatures are only replayed to the originating provider.

  • Constructor Details

    • GeminiContentAdapter

      public GeminiContentAdapter()

  • Method Details

    • toGoogle

      public List<com.google.genai.types.Content> toGoogle()
      Performs the conversion from the Anahata message to a list of Google GenAI Content objects.
      Returns:
      A list of Content objects, or an empty list if no content is visible.

    • shouldInjectInbandMetadata

      private boolean shouldInjectInbandMetadata()
      Determines if in-band metadata (headers) should be injected into the parts based on session configuration and message state.
      Returns:
      True if injection is enabled and allowed for this message.

    • toGoogleUser

      private com.google.genai.types.Content toGoogleUser()
      Converts a user-role message into a native Google Content object.

      Implementation details: Injects a turn-level metadata header and then processes individual parts with interleaved part-level metadata.

      Returns:
      The user content or null if empty.

    • toGoogleModel

      private List<com.google.genai.types.Content> toGoogleModel()
      Synthesizes a model-role message into multiple API messages.

      Implementation details: Produces a 'model' role message containing the model's generated content (text/calls) and an optional 'tool' role message containing the execution results of any triggered tools.

      Returns:
      A list of synthesized Content objects.

    • addPartWithMetadata

      private void addPartWithMetadata(List<com.google.genai.types.Part> googleParts, AbstractPart part)
      Adds a single Anahata part to the Google parts list, handling metadata injection and pruned content replacement.
      Parameters:
      googleParts - The target list for native parts.
      part - The Anahata part to process.

    • createMetadataPartBuilder

      private com.google.genai.types.Part.Builder createMetadataPartBuilder(String text)
      Creates a builder for a metadata part containing the specified text.
      Parameters:
      text - The metadata header text.
      Returns:
      A Part.Builder.

    • createMetadataPart

      private com.google.genai.types.Part createMetadataPart(String text)
      Creates a native metadata part.
      Parameters:
      text - The metadata header text.
      Returns:
      A native Part.
